result.stdout:
Description:
  Cslint - Fast C# linter respecting .editorconfig

Usage:
  cslint [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  One or more paths to C# files or directories to lint

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information
  --format        Output format: text, json, or sarif [default: text]
  --severity      Minimum severity to report: info, warning, or error [default: info]
  --exclude       Glob patterns to exclude (e.g., **/Generated/*.cs)
  --list-rules    List all available rules and exit
  --show-config   Show resolved .editorconfig settings for the given path and exit
  --semantic      Enable semantic analysis for advanced rules
  --summary       Show a summary of diagnostics grouped by rule ID
  --rules         Comma-separated rule IDs to run (e.g., CSLINT266,CSLINT268), or 'all' to enable every rule. Ignores .editorconfig when set.
  --version       Show version information and exit
